message:
feat(assign): Add load-aware balanced strategy with tie-breakers (bd-1g5t8)

Wire AssignmentStore tracking into CLI balanced strategy:
- Pre-populate assignment counts from active assignments
- Add tie-breaker cascade: fewer assignments → capability score →
  least-recently assigned → lower pane index (determinism)
- Add tests for load-aware tie-breaker logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
